meta.title: Kaztop — industrial polymer floors across Kazakhstan
meta.description: Kaztop — poured polymer floors for developers, malls and parkings. Made in Kazakhstan. Quote after a site visit.

hero.title: Turnkey industrial poured floors — handed over without defects
hero.subtitle: 2,020,000 m² poured · 250+ projects

segments.title: Solutions for your facility
segments.subtitle: Three typical scenarios — each with its own coating and schedule requirements.

developer.title: For developers
developer.pain: Large areas and a tight handover schedule.
developer.solution: We pour floors in parkings, entrance lobbies, storage and commercial spaces of residential complexes — on the general contractor's schedule and handed over without defects. Materials come from our own warehouse, with no supply delays.

mall.title: For malls & retail
mall.pain: Heavy footfall, work without closing the mall.
mall.solution: Wear-resistant decorative floors; installation in stages and at night — without closing retail zones or losing rent.

parking.title: For parkings
parking.pain: Salt, oil and tyres destroy the concrete slab.
parking.solution: Chemical-resistant polyurethane coatings with line marking and anti-slip — protect the slab and simplify cleaning.

objects.title: Our projects
objects.subtitle: Completed projects across Kazakhstan — from parkings and residential complexes to industrial and sports facilities.
objects.sample_note: sample — to be replaced with Kaztop photos

prices.title: Cost guideline
prices.subtitle: Prices are indicative. The exact estimate is calculated by an engineer after a site visit.
prices.note: The cost depends on the substrate condition, area and coating type.
prices.disclaimer: Market guideline, not a public offer.

about.title: Company
about.lead: KAZTOP is a Kazakhstani manufacturer of polymer materials for industrial concrete floors. We design the system, produce the materials at our own plant and carry out the installation ourselves — from substrate preparation to handover and care.
about.made_in_kz_desc: Plant, warehouse and laboratory in Kazakhstan. Materials are in stock: shipment without waiting for production and delivery. ST-KZ certificate of origin, incoming and outgoing quality control.
about.experience_desc: Experience on facilities of any complexity — from warehouses and parkings to food and pharmaceutical production.
about.geo_desc: Materials, design, installation and supervised installation, warranty support — all in one hand.
about.cert_alt: ST-KZ certificate No. KZ 0 101 00450 — certificate of origin
about.cert_alt2: ST-KZ certificate No. KZ 0 101 00450 — additional sheet
about.repair_alt: Repair technology for industrial coatings and concrete substrates
about.qc_1: Quality control per the ISO 9001 standard
about.repair_1: Repair of cracks, potholes and joints

sponsors.title: We support sport
sponsors.subtitle: KAZTOP — sponsor of Kazakhstan's sports teams and tournaments.

selection.title: Coating selection for your facility
selection.subtitle: The floor build-up is determined by operating conditions and substrate state. We zone the area by type and intensity of impact — and propose a system for each zone.
base_desc: We assess the concrete class and pull-off strength with an adhesion tester (requirement — at least 2 MPa), checking flatness and the actual screed thickness.
We inspect the substrate for voids and delamination, record cracks and defects, evaluate inter-layer adhesion and determine the scope of repair (routing, injection).
We monitor the residual concrete moisture (norm — up to 4%) and the substrate temperature before application.
We check substrate readiness and agree the work schedule, ventilation and application temperature regime.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: From request to project handover — a full cycle and technical support.

steps.title: Request and consultation
steps.desc: Information and technical support: we select the coating type for the task, loads and budget.

steps.title: Site visit and substrate assessment
steps.desc: On-site measurement, diagnostics of strength, moisture and defects, preparation recommendations.

steps.title: Design and trial application
steps.desc: System composition, thickness and color; if needed — a trial area right on site.

steps.title: Installation and supervised installation
steps.desc: Installation by our crew or technical supervision of your contractors, tool selection.

steps.title: Post-warranty service
steps.desc: Project acceptance, operation and care recommendations, warranty and post-warranty support.

palette.title: Color and texture
palette.subtitle: Standard RAL colors and decorative flakes. Other colors and compositions — on request.
palette.disclaimer: On-screen colors are a guide. The exact tone is matched against the RAL reference scale and samples.

advantages.title: From stock — fast to your site
advantages.stock_desc: In our own warehouse — no waiting for production.
advantages.ship_desc: We ship from the warehouse without waiting for supply.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes what personal data we process on the site and how we protect it — in line with the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan “On Personal Data and Its Protection” No. 94-V.
privacy.s1_b: The data operator is sole proprietor Toishibekov. For personal-data matters, contact us via the phone/WhatsApp listed in the “Contacts” section of the site.
privacy.s2_b: Via the request form — your name and phone number, which you enter yourself. Via analytics — anonymized technical visit data (pages, device, referral source).
privacy.s3_b: Name and phone — to contact you and prepare a quote for your request. Analytics data — to improve the site (anonymized statistics).
privacy.s4_b: Processing is based on your consent, which you give by ticking the checkbox when submitting the form. Consent can be withdrawn at any time (see “Your rights”).
privacy.s5_b: The form does not store data on the site or our server: on submit it opens WhatsApp with ready-made text, and you send the message yourself. The request thus reaches us in WhatsApp.
privacy.s6_b: When you submit a request, the message with your data is sent to the WhatsApp messenger. For anonymized visit statistics, the site uses Google Analytics.
privacy.s7_b: The site uses cookies and Google Analytics for anonymized visit statistics. You can disable cookies in your browser settings — this will not affect the site.
privacy.s8_b: Requests are not stored on the site’s servers; the conversation stays in the parties’ WhatsApp accounts. We take reasonable protection measures. Storage of personal data of RK citizens follows RK legislation (Art. 17 of Law No. 94-V).
privacy.s9_b: You may withdraw consent, request information about your data, its correction, blocking or deletion. To do so, contact us using the details listed on the site.
privacy.s10_b: We may update this policy. The current version is always available on this page.
privacy.law: Basis: Law of the RK “On Personal Data and Its Protection” No. 94-V, 21.05.2013.
